title: In Ink we Rise (Defile)
description: An addon to the Defile mod
body:
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b9a5d6ff61d72d01a0a5fdc77f66babcb96630.png)**Features**
**Items / Blocks**

**Funeral Cleaver**
- Right click to gain 10 seconds of Inkmorphosis (30 Second Cooldown)
        
**Bottle of Inkmorphosis**
- Like the totem of uncleansing just as a bottle so u dont have to die to get 5 minutes of Inkmorphosis

**Defile  Effigy**
- An effigy that when held in the inventory, grants permanent Inkmorphosis at  the cost of being unable to regen past 5 hearts

**Black Document**
- Right click to summon Blackrain for 15 minutes

**Black Contract**
- Right click to summon Blackrain for 60 minutes

**Decorative Blocks**
- Funeral Brazier
- Funeral Block
- Funeral Bricks
- Funeral Tiles
- Chiseled Funeral Block
- Funeral Block Pattern
- Iron Fortified Ink Bricks
- Ink Block (Slows the player and doesn't allow him to jump)
- 
**Recipe Items**
- Funeral Ingot
- Funeral Nugget
- Inkling Crest
- Inked Template
- Ink

**Soon to come:**
- Inked Brush
- Sticky Boots
- Ink Cookie
-----------
**Funeral Cleaver Texture (updated) made by 
[Krimson](https://modrinth.com/user/KrimsonCinder)**

---
